lessons.title: Post-Exploitation Fundamentals 🎯
lessons.description: Understand the goals and mindset after gaining initial access.

lessons.title: Maintaining Access: Persistence 🔗
lessons.description: Learn to survive reboots and keep your foothold with backdoors and scheduled tasks.

lessons.title: Privilege Escalation: Becoming Root/Admin 👑
lessons.description: Elevate from a low-privilege user to SYSTEM or root.

lessons.title: Situational Awareness & Internal Enumeration 🔍
lessons.description: Map the compromised host and discover other systems on the network.

lessons.title: Lateral Movement & Pivoting 🌉
lessons.description: Use the compromised machine as a jump box to attack other internal targets.

lessons.title: Data Exfiltration & Covering Tracks 🧹
lessons.description: Steal sensitive data and erase evidence of your presence.
